relations.label: sets up AI agent with GPT-5.4 model
sets up account with GPT-5.4-mini model
utilizes ChatGPT as account auth method

card.subtitle: 中转的配置1： model provider = "crs" model = "gpt 5.4" model reasoning effort = "high" preferred auth method = "apikey" approval policy = "never" sandbox mo...

article.body:
中转的配置1：
model_provider = "crs"
model = "gpt-5.4"
model_reasoning_effort = "high"
preferred_auth_method = "apikey"

approval_policy = "never"
sandbox_mode = "danger-full-access"
windows_wsl_setup_acknowledged = true
disable_response_storage = true


[model_providers.crs]
name = "crs"
base_url = "https://apikey.soxio.me/openai"
wire_api = "responses"
requires_openai_auth = true


{

  "auth_mode": "apikey",

  "OPENAI_API_KEY": "cr_17947b0a0d0d39de66c4c46204e28317b1db121128bda08dcade5588dfdf26b8"

}
